title: Require Domain Source Topology
forbids: domain roots, ops roots, operation roots, model roots, or artifact roots outside the positive domain blueprint topology
why: The domain blueprint is a closed authority plane. Root helper surfaces, shared buckets, config facades, operation-family buckets, and broad artifacts modules must resolve to model schemas, model policy, model data, artifact owners, operation-local owners, external resource owners, or deletion.
remediate: Move each red entry to its named owner slot, split broad helper buckets into primitives/policy/data, inline operation contract envelopes, or delete residue that has no destination.
message: Domain source must match the positive domain blueprint topology.
